name: 3 in 1 Convertible Stroller for 14" - 16" Dolls - Gigglescape™: Toy Stroller Baby Doll Accessories
description:
Encourage hours of nurturing, on-the-go pretend play for your tiny tot with this 3-in-1 Convertible Dolls Stroller from Gigglescape™. This stylish 3-in-1 stroller for dolls features star print for a delightful look. The convertible stroller features a sun shade, storage basket and a cover to keep their dolls covered, while smooth wheels and an easy-to-grab handle make trips down the hallway a breeze. Compatible with most 14-16 inch dolls, the 3-in-1 stroller folds flat for easy storage or travel.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
